questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: Which one of the following diagrams best depicts the relationship between Males and Females?

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: Which one of the following diagrams best depicts the relationship between Seconds, Minutes and Hours?

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: Which one of the following diagrams best depicts the relationship between Kanpur, Varanasi and Meerut?

solutions.solution: Males and females represents two different genders which are not related to each other in any manner. This can be expressed as given in option (a).
Seconds are the part of minute and minutes are the part of hour. This relation can be expressed by option (d).
Kanpur, Varanasi and Meerut all are cities of Uttar Pradesh but they are entirely different from one another. This can be expressed by option (a).
